parameters.query:
-- Evaluates the target table for a matching supplier and invoice pair to prevent duplicate records.
-- Returns 1 (aliased as 'item_exists') if the invoice is found, or defaults to 0 if no record exists.
SELECT COALESCE((
    SELECT TOP 1 1 
    FROM dbo.supplier_invoices 
    -- Dynamically references the validated output from the 'Validate & Normalize Rows' node
    WHERE supplier_number = '{{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.supplier_number }}' 
      AND invoice_number = '{{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.invoice_number }}'
), 0) AS item_exists;

-- Inserts a validated, normalized invoice record into the production SQL Server ledger.
INSERT INTO dbo.supplier_invoices (
    invoice_number, 
    supplier_number, 
    supplier_name, 
    department, 
    amount_excl_vat, 
    vat, 
    amount_incl_vat, 
    invoice_date, 
    status,
    validation_notes
) 
VALUES (
    -- Maps primary identity and transactional data from the preceding normalization node
    '{{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.invoice_number }}',
    '{{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.supplier_number }}',
    '{{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.supplier_name }}',
    '{{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.department }}',
    -- Financial values use a fallback to 0 if the source JSON properties are undefined or null
    {{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.amount_excl_vat || 0 }},
    {{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.vat || 0 }},
    {{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.amount_incl_vat || 0 }},
    -- Forces the date string into a standard SQL Date format (ISO 120 style)
    CONVERT(DATE, '{{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.invoice_date }}', 120), 
    'inserted', 
    -- Defaults to 'Clear' if validation notes were omitted during the row-check phase
    '{{ $("Validate & Normalize Rows").item.json.validation_notes || "Clear" }}'
);

-- Checks if the incoming file has already been processed by looking up its unique SHA-256 hash.
-- Returns a constant value of 1 (aliased as 'file_exists') if a matching fingerprint is found.
SELECT TOP 1 1 AS file_exists 
FROM dbo.processed_files_log 
-- Dynamic n8n expression parameter injecting the current file's cryptographic hash
WHERE file_hash = '{{ $json.source_hash }}';

-- Records the cryptographic hash of a successfully processed file into the audit log.
INSERT INTO dbo.processed_files_log (file_hash, date_processed) 
VALUES (
    -- Injects the unique SHA-256 fingerprint generated by the 'Crypto' node for this file
    '{{ $('Crypto').item.json.source_hash }}', 
    -- Captures the current database server timestamp to log the precise completion moment
    GETDATE()
);

-- Inserts a simulated invoice batch into the staging landing zone for dry-run verification.
INSERT INTO dbo.supplier_invoices_staging (
    invoice_number,
    supplier_number,
    supplier_name,
    department,
    amount_excl_vat, 
    vat,
    amount_incl_vat, 
    invoice_date,
    status
)
VALUES (
    -- Maps identity and categorization parameters directly from the current JSON execution object
    '{{ $json.invoice_number }}',
    '{{ $json.supplier_number }}',
    '{{ $json.supplier_name }}',
    '{{ $json.department }}',
    -- Attempts to pull normalized VAT-exclusive amounts, with fallbacks to raw source values or 0
    {{ $json.amount_excl_vat || $json.amount_excl || 0 }},
    -- Pulls calculated VAT total, defaulting to 0 if no tax data is present
    {{ $json.vat || 0 }},
    -- Pulls normalized VAT-inclusive amounts, with fallbacks to raw source values or 0
    {{ $json.amount_incl_vat || $json.amount_incl || 0 }},
    -- Injects the transaction date string for staging audit
    '{{ $json.invoice_date }}',
    -- Hard-coded status identifier marking this record as part of a simulation dry-run
    'staging'
);

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Invoice Ingestion Skipped: Duplicate File Detected
parameters.message:
⚠️ Ingestion Skipped: Duplicate File

The file uploaded has already been completely processed by the system. The ingestion pipeline safely aborted the run to prevent duplicate database entry.

File Reference Metadata

File Name: {{ $('Target your File Node Name').item.json.source_file_name || 'supplier_batch.csv' }}
Match Protocol: SHA-256 IDEMPOTENCY
File Hash: {{ $('Target your Hash Node Name').item.json.source_hash || '315a0d69614ff7b7ca4b2c140d3a5a1332a67e61' }}

Automated notification system • Durban Dev Ingest Engine
